hero.subtext: Professional solar installation, maintenance and inverter battery solutions across Maharashtra.
hero.tagline: Suraj Sabka Hai — Apna Haq Lo.

services.title: Our Services
services.s1d: Complete rooftop solar solutions for homes and businesses.
services.s2d: Regular cleaning, inspection, and repair of solar panels.
services.s4d: Reliable battery backups for night-time energy use.
services.s6d: Year-round peace of mind with scheduled maintenance.
services.banner: Not sure which service you need? Talk to our solar expert — free consultation

about.story: Founded in 2022, SolarEdge Pro was born from a simple belief — that every home in Maharashtra deserves access to clean, affordable energy. Our founder, having witnessed firsthand the burden of rising electricity bills on hardworking Maharashtra families, set out to make solar energy accessible, affordable, and hassle-free for every household.
about.tagline: Suraj Sabka Hai — Apna Haq Lo.
about.title: Founder & CEO
about.quote: "We don't just install panels, we empower families."

calculator.title: Solar Estimate Calculator
calculator.disclaimer: * Estimates are indicative and based on average Maharashtra MSEDCL tariffs and PM Surya Ghar subsidy rules as of 2024. Actual system size, cost and savings may vary. Contact us for a free site assessment.
